title: Bike Touring Vlog - Semijarvi, Finland to Amsterdam, Netherlands 8 & 9-2010 3/5

Bikes on the train at all I was like what yeah because like nor sweden's a not a good place to
Bike tour dude I mean you're always getting funneled into the highway I was riding the
